title: Israel orders fresh evacuations in south Lebanon — Day 12 ceasefire violations
snippet: Israel's military warned residents of more than a dozen villages and towns in southern Lebanon to immediately evacuate and head northwards, saying it would respond to Hezbollah's 'violation of the ceasefire'. IDF: 'does not intend to harm you, and out of concern for your safety, you are required to evacuate immediately and move toward the Sidon District.' Day 12 of ceasefire; total killed since March 2: 2,491; wounded: 7,719.
tag_reason: 레바논 휴전 위반의 후속 보도. Day 12 신규 강제 퇴거 명령은 새 정보.
